    • Confounding & misaligned covariates

SDALGCP2: Fast Spatially Discrete Approximation to Log-Gaussian Cox Processes

Source: R/SDALGCP2-package.R
SDALGCP2-package.Rd

A faster, modernised successor to the SDALGCP package for fitting a spatially discrete approximation to a log-Gaussian Cox process (SDA-LGCP) to spatially aggregated disease counts. Performance-critical steps are implemented in C++ via RcppArmadillo. See DESIGN.md in the package source for the full design and statistical roadmap.

See also
